zh.London, Middlesex, Canada West, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加加拿大 韋斯特米德萊可倫敦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Aaron John FitzRoger於1275年出生在英國薩默塞特阿生頓時，他的父親Aaron Fitzrogers I26歲，母親Gorrana De Crepon36歲。他和Sybill Dacerra至少有2個兒子。他去世於1337年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加加拿大 韋斯特米德萊可倫敦享年62歲。

zh-hans.London, Middlesex, Canada West, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加加拿大 韋斯特米德萊可倫敦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Aaron John FitzRoger于1275年出生在英国薩默塞特阿生頓时，他的父亲Aaron Fitzrogers I26岁，母亲Gorrana De Crepon36岁。他和Sybill Dacerra至少有2个儿子。他去世于1337年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加加拿大 韋斯特米德萊可倫敦享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aaron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the brother of Moses, who was appointed by God to be Moses' spokesman and became the first High Priest of the Israelites (Exodus 4:14–16, 7:1–2). It is of uncertain origin and meaning: most probably, like Moses , of Egyptian rather than Hebrew origin. The traditional derivation from Hebrew har-on ‘mountain of strength’ is no more than a folk etymology. The name has been in regular use from time immemorial as a Jewish name and was taken up by the Nonconformists as a Christian name in the 16th century. Since the late 1990s it has been widely popular.

variants.name: Arun
meanings: ‘reddish-brown’, the colour of dawn, gold, and rubies, and personification of the dawn, the charioteer of the sun.

variants.name: Arron
meanings: Variant of either   Aaron   or   Arran .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Aaron John FitzRoger was born in 1275, in Ashington, Somerset, England, his father, Aaron Fitzrogers I, was 26 and his mother, Gorrana De Crepon, was 36. He had at least 2 sons with Sybill Dacerra. He died in 1337, in London, Middlesex, Canada West, British Colonial America, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Aaron John FitzRoger est né en 1275, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Aaron Fitzrogers I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Gorrana De Crepon, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Sybill Dacerra. Il est décédé en 1337, à London, Middlesex, Canada-Ouest, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.London, Middlesex, Canada West, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 캔아다 웨스트 미들레세스 런던
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Aaron John FitzRoger(이)가 1275년 영국 서머세트 애신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aaron Fitzrogers I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Gorrana De Crepon(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Sybill Dacerra(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1337년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 캔아다 웨스트 미들레세스 런던에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.London, Middlesex, Canada West, British: лондон, миддлесекс, канада вест, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Aaron John FitzRoger родился в 1275 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Aaron Fitzrogers I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Gorrana De Crepon, 36. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Sybill Dacerra. Он умер в 1337 г. в местности лондон, миддлесекс, канада вест, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет.
